text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while training for the autumn Tenno
Sho...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Did you see this morning's news, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every year around this time, they release a list of
everyone who has announced their intent to race
in the Senior Autumn Triple Crown races.
choice_data_list:
Now you know who you're up against in each
race.

Now you know who you're up against in each
race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...It doesn't matter who I'm racing. I plan to take
first regardless.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
That said, I'm not so conceited as to overlook this
information.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Going forward, we should take our opponents
into account during training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check all of the materials we have on hand in
order to formulate a strategy to handle Narita
Brian's rivals.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to the list, Hishi Amazon—who made a
fierce showing at the Arima Kinen—has
announced her intent to run in the Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She'll undoubtedly be stronger now than she was
at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And as for the upcoming autumn Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, looks like this one should be in the bag!
You're competing against that
Matikanetannhauser, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Matikanetannhauser. You could say she's
someone people can't stop talking about, in a
sense.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite having ample strength to win G1 races,
various factors seem to always align and prevent
her from winning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stars seemed to have finally aligned for her at
last year's Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But then she apparently got sick right before and
couldn't even run.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
If that's who she's up against, Narita Brian should
have no problem.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
You're running in the Japan Cup, right? If so, you
ought to just focus your efforts on dealing with
that "Queen of the Amazons" there.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, you're too by the book. You're going to
tire yourself out if you don't catch what breaks
you can.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Not to mention, you both seem to be making a
big fuss about this "sisterly showdown," but the
truth is that the media expects Biwa Hayahide to
dr—

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text: H-hey! Where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the training course, Narita Brian has just
finished her warm-up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to go anytime, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian is a racer who has a head-on
approach to running. Surely, the autumn Tenno
Sho will be no exception...
choice_data_list:
You're taking the autumn Tenno Sho seriously,
right?

You're taking the autumn Tenno Sho seriously,
right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Only racing can satisfy this craving in my heart.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And this is the Twinkle Series—there's no time to
cut corners.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's no such thing as an easy opponent, so I
always take my races seriously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hey, what's the matter? We don't have time to sit
around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Narita Brian runs training drills
repeatedly in preparation for the autumn Tenno
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That night...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Is this everything?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sis?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Why aren't you wearing your uniform? Today's a
weekday.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...There's no training today, so I'm going out.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
By the way, it makes me proud to see you working
so hard every day.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Don't talk like it has nothing to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning on surpassing you, so you better be
ready.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...I'm already one of many behind you, looking at your
back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Come again?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian, just keep on running ahead. Don't ever
look back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sis?
